/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -compatibility_version 1.0.0 -current_version 1.0.0 -o libfestivalmesh.1.0.0.dylib -install_name @rpath/libfestivalmesh.1.dylib CMakeFiles/festivalmesh.dir/src/MeshEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/festivalmesh.dir/src/SecurityManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/festivalmesh.dir/src/mesh_c_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/festivalmesh.dir/src/monocypher.c.o
